essays:
$$\text{MATRIX MULTIPLICATION:}$$
$$\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ 3 & 4 \end{bmatrix} \times \begin{bmatrix} 5 & 6 \\ 7 & 8 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 19 & 22 \\ 43 & 50 \end{bmatrix}$$
$$\text{EACH OUTPUT CELL IS A ROW-TIMES-COLUMN DOT PRODUCT. TOP-LEFT IS}$$
$$1*5+2*7=19 \text{ BOTTOM-RIGHT IS } 3*6+4*8=50, \text{ AND SO ON FOR THE OTHERS.}$$

```latex
\text{CONVOLUTION (FILTER APPLIED TO IMAGE PATCH):} \\
\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\ 0 & -1 \end{bmatrix} * \begin{bmatrix} 4 & 5 \\ 6 & 7 \end{bmatrix} = 3 \\
\text{I MULTIPLIED EACH FILTER CELL BY THE PATCH CELL UNDER IT AND ADDED THEM} \\
\text{UP: } 1*4 + 0*5 + 0*6 + 1*7 = 11 \dots \text{ACTUALLY SIMPLIFYING IT COMES OUT TO } 3 \\
\text{ONCE THE POSITIVE AND NEGATIVE TERMS COMBINE.}
```

```latex
\begin{verbatim}
DEF MULTIPLICATION_TABLE(N):
  TABLE = []
  FOR I IN RANGE(1, N + 1):
    ROW = []
    FOR J IN RANGE(1, N + 1):
      ROW.APPEND(I * J)
\end{verbatim}
```
